phase accumulator: duty += INCREMENT on each valid transfer

nodes.note: Peripheral-side interconnect: MB → GPIO_IN, GPIO_OUT, UART, DMA, INTC

key_logic: AXI tie-off pattern: awvalid=0, arvalid=0, wvalid=0 (lines 18-20)

nodes.name: LMB Memory Subsystem (dlmb_v10 + ilmb_v10 + dlmb_bram_if_cntlr + ilmb_bram_if_cntlr + lmb_bram_0)

nodes.note: Only uncommented pins in XDC — audio is active

nodes.spec: MIG ui_clk: ~81 MHz → MicroBlaze, AXI fabric, DMA, peripherals
nodes.note: ~81 MHz is derived, exact value depends on MIG DDR2 configuration

nodes.spec: AXI DMA: 256-byte burst, 27-bit address width, simple mode (no SG)

nodes.note: CRITICAL WARNING in synthesis: duplicate clock definitions — sys_clk_pin overrides sys_clock

nodes.content: tone_generator.v:69 — `assign axis_tlast = 1'b1;` (constant 1 — no packet framing, BUG)
nodes.parse_flag: PARSE_UNCERTAIN — WHY tlast=1 was chosen not documented by engineer

nodes.content: helloworld.c:386 — `case DEMO_MODE_HW_TONE_GEN: break;` (hardware tone gen disabled in SW)
axis2fifo.v:33 — `assign axis_tready = ~fifo_full;` (backpressure via FIFO full flag)
README.md — 'Hardware Tone Generation functionality is not currently working.'
project_info.tcl line 4 — `set_property part xc7a50ticsg324-1L` (50T, project name says 100T → FPGA part inconsistency)
design_1.tcl line 53 — `create_project project_1 myproj -part xc7a50ticsg324-1L` (also 50T, corroborates ISSUE-A-001)
tone_generator.v:51-52 — `assign axis_tvalid = 1;` (always valid — no backpressure control)
tone_generator.v:72 — TODO: 'create AXI interface for configuration of INCREMENT and PACKET_SIZE params' (incomplete feature)

provenance.source: direct code read — TODO comment extraction

nodes.content: utilization_summary.txt — Synthesis PASSED: 1412 LUT (1.05%), 1285 FF (0.48%), 2 BRAM (0.55%), WNS > 0 ns
axi_gpio_wrapper.v:13-31 — AXI tie-off: awvalid=0, wvalid=0, arvalid=0, bready=1, rready=1 (AXI Slave Tie-off Pattern)
SYNTHESIS_RESULTS.md — 3 CRITICAL WARNINGs: duplicate clock, missing UART ports in XDC, LMB clock period mismatch (all accepted as non-blocking)

nodes.title: FPGA Part Tutarsızlığı: project_info.tcl ve design_1.tcl 50T, proje 100T
nodes.description: project_info.tcl (line 4) ve design_1.tcl (line 53) xc7a50ticsg324-1L (Nexys A7-50T) kullanıyor. Proje adı, README ve ister dokümanı xc7a100tcsg324-1 (Nexys A7-100T) bekliyor. XDC dosyası Nexys-A7-100T-Master.xdc adını taşıyor. Bu kritik tutarsızlık, yanlış FPGA için sentez yapılmasına ve 50T'nin kaynak kısıtı nedeniyle sentezin başarısız olmasına yol açabilir.
nodes.related_constraint_conflict: CONST-A-CLK-002: 140.625 MHz MIG reference clock → 50T'de DDR2 PHY timing farklı
nodes.remediation: project_info.tcl ve design_1.tcl'de part xc7a100tcsg324-1 olarak güncellenmeli; board_part digilentinc.com:nexys-a7-100t:part0:1.0 olmalı

nodes.title: HW Tone Generator çalışmıyor: axis_tlast=1 hatası + SW'de devre dışı
nodes.description: tone_generator.v:69 — axis_tlast sabit 1 atanmış, her clock cycle'da TLAST aktif → DMA her transfer'i 1 beat olarak görür, burst verimsiz. Ayrıca modül 16-bit üretirken fifo2audpwm 8-bit bekliyor (genişlik uyumsuzluğu). Yazılımda DEMO_MODE_HW_TONE_GEN case'i sadece break yapıyor (helloworld.c:386).
nodes.parse_flag: PARSE_UNCERTAIN — WHY axis_tlast=1 chose mühendis belgesi yok; README 'not currently working' dışında açıklama yok
nodes.remediation: 1) axis_tlast = (packet_count == PACKET_SIZE-1) olarak düzelt; 2) output genişliğini 8-bit'e indirge; 3) helloworld.c case DEMO_MODE_HW_TONE_GEN'de dma_forward çağır

nodes.title: Sadece 96 kHz WAV destekleniyor
nodes.description: PWM clock (24.576 MHz) / 256 = 96 kHz sabit donanım clock'u. Farklı sample rate WAV dosyaları reddediliyor veya yanlış çalıyor.

nodes.title: 16-bit → 8-bit truncation ses kalitesini düşürür
nodes.description: 16-bit WAV dosyaları 8-bit'e truncate ediliyor → ~48 dB yerine ~8-bit SNR.

nodes.title: WAV dosyaları bellekte kalıcı saklanmaz
nodes.description: Oynatma sonrası WAV verisi DDR2'de kalır ama uygulama kapatıldığında veya yeniden başladığında kaybolur. BRAM veya flash'a yazma mekanizması yok.

nodes.title: Polling tabanlı GPIO — interrupt handler implement edilmemiş
nodes.description: Donanımda INTC + xlconcat mevcut ama yazılım polling kullanıyor. INTC donanım kaynağı boşa harcanıyor. Buton DMA transfer sırasında basılırsa kaçırılabilir.

nodes.title: Testbench dosyası yok
nodes.description: src/ altında simülasyon testbench'i bulunmuyor. Fonksiyonel doğrulama sadece hardware üzerinde yapılabilir.

nodes.title: digilent-vivado-scripts submodule boş (init edilmemiş)
nodes.description: .gitmodules'da tanımlı ama init/update yapılmamış. TCL build automation çalışmaz.

nodes.title: XDC'de duplicate clock definition — sys_clk_pin overrides sys_clock
nodes.description: nexys_video.xdc (or generated MB XDC) defines clock twice. CRITICAL WARNING from Vivado: [Constraints 18-1056]. Final timing still passes but XDC should be cleaned.
nodes.remediation: Remove duplicate clock constraint, keep only one create_clock

nodes.title: XDC'de UART port tanımları var ama design'da UART yok
nodes.description: CRITICAL WARNING: [Common 17-55] 'set_property' expects at least one object for ports 'usb_uart_rxd' and 'usb_uart_txd'. XDC has template UART pins not used in current design.
nodes.remediation: Remove unused UART lines from XDC

nodes.title: Tam Sistem (AXI BRAM + GPIO) geliştirilmekte — block automation timeout
nodes.description: README.md: '⏳ Geliştirilmekte — Block Automation'dan sonra Connection Automation: Stuck (5+ dakika)'. Seviye 3 örneği henüz tamamlanmamış.
accum += INCREMENT; sample = accum >> (ACCUMULATOR_DEPTH - OUTPUT_BITS). Produces frequency = INCREMENT / 2^DEPTH * sample_rate
Minimal RTL adapter: axis_tready = ~fifo_full; fifo_wr_en = axis_tready & axis_tvalid; fifo_wr_data = axis_tdata[N:0]
pwm_out = (counter < duty_cycle). Counter wraps creating PWM carrier. Duty cycle changes on counter overflow.
Xilinx FIFO Generator in independent_clocks mode with gray-code pointers for safe clock domain crossing
Upstream tready = ~fifo_full — when FIFO is full, DMA is stalled via AXI-Stream backpressure

nodes.pattern_name: WAV Header Parsing via Struct Pointer Cast
nodes.description: Raw byte buffer cast to Wav_HeaderRaw/FormatRaw/DataRaw structs for RIFF chunk navigation
Standalone AXI IP instantiation with all AXI input ports tied to safe values: awvalid=0, wvalid=0, arvalid=0 (no requests), bready=1, rready=1 (always accept responses)
nodes.note: This pattern teaches AXI signal semantics explicitly

nodes.description: 3-level progression: Lvl1=Standalone GPIO (tie-off, ~8s) → Lvl2=Minimal MicroBlaze+GPIO (no peripherals, ~20s) → Lvl3=MicroBlaze+AXI GPIO (full system, ~4min synthesis)
vivado -mode batch -source script.tcl pattern for reproducible, version-controlled block design creation. 8-20 second project creation vs 5-10 min GUI.
Vivado's apply_bd_automation command automatically creates LMB, reset controller, MDM, clock connections for MicroBlaze subsystem
clk_wiz.locked → proc_sys_reset.dcm_locked ensures system only resets after PLL is stable. Prevents metastability on startup.
nodes.note: Cross-project pattern: same pattern in PROJECT-A (MIG-based) and PROJECT-B (PLL-based)

nodes.title: Sistem Gereksinimleri — Nexys A7-100T DMA Audio Demo
acceptance_criteria: Nexys A7-100T üzerinde DMA tabanlı ses akışı gerçekleştirilir
DDR2 RAM üzerinden ses verisi PWM çıkışa aktarılır
UART üzerinden WAV dosyası alınıp oynatılabilir
Seri terminal (230400 baud) üzerinden etkileşim sağlanır

nodes.title: Veri Yolu Alt Sistemi (Data Path)
acceptance_criteria: AXI DMA MM2S kanalı ile DDR2'den ses verisi stream edilir
AXI DMA S2MM kanalı ile ses verisi DDR2'ye kaydedilir
DMA ↔ DDR2 veri yolu AXI Interconnect ile yönetilir
Dual-clock FIFO ile DMA clock → audio clock geçişi sağlanır

nodes.title: Sinyal Yolu Alt Sistemi (Signal Path) [v2.0 YENİ]
acceptance_criteria: 3 clock domain arası geçişler güvenli yapılır
Reset zinciri: MIG ui_clk_sync_rst → proc_sys_reset → peripheral_aresetn
PWM enable sinyali FIFO durumuna göre kontrol edilir

nodes.title: UART WAV Dosyası Alma ve Oynatma
Interrupt Controller
nodes.note: Hardware present, software uses polling. See DMA-DEC-005.

nodes.title: AXI Bus Mimarisi Eğitim / Validasyon Test Suite

Ses çıkış yöntemi olarak PWM seçimi
nodes.chosen_option: FPGA dahili PWM + onboard SSM2377 amplifier

nodes.title: MicroBlaze + AXI DMA mimarisi seçimi
nodes.chosen_option: MicroBlaze soft processor + AXI DMA simple mode

nodes.title: 8-bit Audio Çözünürlük Kararı
nodes.rationale: 24.576 MHz / 256 = 96 kHz carrier > 20 kHz audible range. 16-bit would give 375 Hz carrier (audible!)

nodes.title: Interrupt controller kurulması ama yazılımda polling kullanılması
nodes.parse_flag: PARSE_UNCERTAIN — engineer did not document this decision explicitly
nodes.classification_rationale: Hardware requirement DMA-REQ-L2-011 is satisfied (INTC is present). The software not using interrupts is a documented architectural choice (DMA-DEC-005), even if PARSE_UNCERTAIN about motivation. This is NOT a coverage gap because: (1) the hardware component exists and is correctly instantiated, (2) the decision to use polling is deliberate (Block Automation default + simplicity for demo), (3) future interrupt-driven mode is explicitly mentioned as next step.

nodes.title: 3 seviyeli kademeli eğitim yaklaşımı
nodes.chosen_option: Standalone GPIO → Minimal MicroBlaze → MicroBlaze + AXI GPIO

edges.note: axis2fifo writes to FIFO (full flag feedback)
fifo2audpwm reads from FIFO (empty flag feedback)
Sends AXI-Stream to DMA S2MM (disabled in SW)
SW controls DMA via AXI-Lite register interface

match_evidence: 24.576 MHz clock domain verified in component
Component exists and is instantiated in BD
unmatched_aspects: axis_tlast=1 bug means DMA burst does not work → functional requirement NOT met
16-bit output vs 8-bit expected → bit width mismatch

match_evidence: Requirement mentions 'recv_wav, play_wav' functions matching helloworld.c
unmatched_aspects: Only 96 kHz sample rate supported — ISSUE-A-003

match_evidence: Requirement names GPIO_IN, 5-bit buttons + 16-bit switches dual channel
Requirement names GPIO_OUT, LED output channels
140.625 MHz and 24.576 MHz outputs match constraints

unmatched_aspects: Software does NOT use interrupt handler — DMA-DEC-005 documents this as intentional decision

match_evidence: DMA is primary data path component
simple mode (no SG) matches DMA-REQ-L1-001 constraint
MIG DDR2 is infrastructure component providing ui_clk and DDR2 memory
axis2fifo implements AXI-Stream handshake portion of Signal Path ister
fifo2audpwm implements PWM enable signal control (aud_en=FIFO_empty) per Signal Path requirement
FIFO implements CDC with gray-code pointers as required by Signal Path ister
AXI tie-off pattern matches acceptance criteria
PLL lock → reset release connection verified
AXI master port enables GPIO access
axi_gpio_wrapper demonstrates AXI tie-off signal pattern per Signal Path requirement
PLL lock → reset release implements Signal Path reset chain requirement
axis2fifo.v:35 directly implements '32-bit AXI-Stream verisinin alt 16 biti FIFO'ya yazılır'
fifo2audpwm.v:23-26 implements aud_en=0 when FIFO empty requirement
tone_generator.v:69 axis_tlast=1 is the verified bug causing non-compliance
README confirms HW tone gen not working — partial L0 non-compliance
utilization_summary.txt: synthesis passed, WNS > 0 ns, <5% resource use (1.05% LUT)
axi_gpio_wrapper.v:13-31 implements AXI tie-off pattern as required
fifo2audpwm_0 runs on 24.576 MHz as defined in constraint
DMA burst size 256 bytes matches constraint
PWM pin A11 is active constraint in XDC
0x40000000 base address matches AXI GPIO constraint
R4 pin, 100 MHz, period 10 ns matches clock constraint

edges.note: Both use Xilinx Clocking Wizard v6.0 for clock generation. PROJECT-A: multi-output (140.625+24.576 MHz). PROJECT-B: single output (100 MHz). Same PLL lock → reset pattern.
Both use proc_sys_reset v5.0. PROJECT-A: MIG-based (DDR2 calibration gating). PROJECT-B: PLL-lock based. Same pattern, different reset trigger.
Both use MDM v3.2 for JTAG debug. PROJECT-B adds C_USE_UART=1 for serial console without external UART IP.
Both use MicroBlaze. PROJECT-A v10.0 with I+D cache (DDR2 performance). PROJECT-B v11.0 without cache (8KB BRAM, no DDR). Different versions, same soft-processor role.
PLL Lock → Reset Release pattern reused in PROJECT-B from standard FPGA design practice. PROJECT-A variant uses MIG ui_clk_sync_rst as additional reset trigger.
Both use AXI GPIO IP. PROJECT-A: dual-channel, 5+16 bit I/O. PROJECT-B: 8-bit output only. Same IP, different config scope.

coverage_gaps.title: HW Tone Generator ister var ama component çalışmıyor
coverage_gaps.description: tone_generator_0 bileşeni var ve DMA-REQ-L2-003'ü implements ediyor ama fonksiyonel gereksinimler karşılanmıyor. axis_tlast=1 hatası (EVID-A-003) ve 16-bit/8-bit genişlik uyumsuzluğu nedeniyle 'should' öncelikli ister implement edilmiş sayılamaz.
coverage_gaps.remediation: tone_generator.v'de axis_tlast ve bit genişliği düzeltilmeli; helloworld.c DEMO_MODE_HW_TONE_GEN case aktifleştirilmeli

coverage_gaps.title: Tam Sistem örneği (MicroBlaze + AXI BRAM + GPIO) tamamlanmamış
coverage_gaps.description: README seviye 3'ü '⏳ Geliştirilmekte' olarak işaretliyor. create_axi_auto.tcl ve create_axi_with_xdc.tcl stabil değil — block automation timeout sorunu. Acceptance criteria 'kademeli ilerleme' için Seviye 3 eksik.
coverage_gaps.remediation: Block automation timeout'u aşmak için manuel bd connection script yazılmalı

orphan_components.title: xlconcat_0 — Interrupt concat, yazılım kullanmıyor
orphan_components.description: Bileşen mevcut ve DMA-REQ-L2-011 kapsamında INTC'ye bağlı. Ancak yazılımın hiçbir zaman interrupt handler çağırmaması nedeniyle işlevsel olarak 'orphan' görünüyor. Formal olarak DMA-DEC-005 kararıyla justifiye edilmiş.
orphan_components.note: DMA-DEC-005 (PARSE_UNCERTAIN decision) bu durumu açıklıyor. Coverage değil decision.

orphan_components.title: xlconcat_1 — GPIO+UART interrupt concat, yazılım kullanmıyor
orphan_components.description: ORP-A-001 ile aynı durum. GPIO ve UART interrupt'larını INTC'ye bağlıyor ama yazılım polling kullanıyor.

constraint_conflicts.title: FPGA Part Çelişkisi: design_1.tcl/project_info.tcl → 50T, ister/README → 100T
impact: 50T has 50K LUTs vs 100T's 101K — MIG DDR2 + MicroBlaze + DMA may exceed 50T resources
50T DDR2 timing constraints may differ from 100T PHY
Synthesis will target wrong device — bitstream incompatible with A7-100T board
constraint_conflicts.root_cause: Likely the project was initially developed for 50T and renamed for 100T, but TCL scripts were not updated
constraint_conflicts.remediation: Update project_info.tcl line 4 and design_1.tcl line 53 to xc7a100tcsg324-1 and board part nexys-a7-100t

constraint_conflicts.title: XDC Duplicate Clock Definition
constraint_conflicts.detail: CRITICAL WARNING [Constraints 18-1056]: sys_clk_pin overrides sys_clock. Two create_clock directives for the same pin.
constraint_conflicts.impact: Non-blocking — final timing passes. But XDC is unclear and could cause issues if design evolves.

special_analyses.conclusion: Two TCL files (project_info.tcl and design_1.tcl) target the 50T device while all other artifacts (XDC, README, requirements) target 100T. CONFLICT-A-001 severity=critical is correct. This is a reproducible build-time failure if scripts are used.

special_analyses.finding: MİMARİ KURALLARA GÖRE DEĞERLENDİRME: ISSUE (PARSE_UNCERTAIN Geçerli)
evidence: tone_generator.v:69 — axis_tlast = 1'b1 (sabit 1, her cycle TLAST aktif)
tone_generator.v:51 — axis_tvalid = 1 (always valid, rate control yok)
README.md — 'Hardware Tone Generation functionality is not currently working'
TODO comment (tone_generator.v:72) — 'create AXI interface for configuration'
special_analyses.architecture_rule_applied: v2 Architecture: PARSE_UNCERTAIN = LLM'in mühendis açıklaması OLMAYAN kısımları için kullanılır. Buradaki PARSE_UNCERTAIN WHY disabled (çalışmama nedeni) için — fiziksel durum (çalışmıyor) kesin kanıtla doğrulanmış.
special_analyses.parse_uncertain_scope: PARSE_UNCERTAIN yalnızca 'neden bu bug bırakıldı?' sorusuna uygulanır. Bu, mühendis tarafından açıkça belgelenmemiş. 'Çalışmıyor' gerçeği ise README ile kesin olarak doğrulanmış (PARSE_UNCERTAIN değil, HIGH confidence).
special_analyses.classification: ISSUE-A-002 (severity=high) doğrudur. tone_generator'ın tasarımdaki varlığı bir hata değil, eksik/kırık bir özellik. DMA-REQ-L2-003 (priority=should) için partial implementation var, functional compliance yok.
special_analyses.verdict: PARSE_UNCERTAIN ISTER DOC'TAKİ YORUM DOĞRU. Mimari kurallarla çelişen bir durum yok.

special_analyses.topic: Interrupt Altyapısı: Coverage Gap mı, Decision mı?
evidence: xlconcat_0: DMA MM2S + S2MM interrupts connected
xlconcat_1: GPIO_IN + GPIO_OUT + UART interrupts connected
helloworld.c: polling-based main loop, no interrupt handler
DMA-DEC-005: explicitly documents this as an architectural decision
reasoning: 1. Hardware requirement DMA-REQ-L2-011 is FULLY SATISFIED — INTC hardware present and correctly wired
2. The software NOT using interrupts is documented as DMA-DEC-005 (architectural decision)
3. DMA-DEC-005 is PARSE_UNCERTAIN for motivation, but the decision EXISTS (it's documented in ISTER doc)
4. A Coverage Gap means 'no component implements this requirement' — here the component IS present
5. An Orphan Component means 'no requirement matches this component' — DMA-REQ-L2-011 DOES match
6. The practical consequence (polling, CPU load) is captured in ISSUE-A-006 (severity=low)
special_analyses.classification: DECISION (DMA-DEC-005) + ISSUE (ISSUE-A-006). NOT a Coverage Gap.
special_analyses.v2_architecture_alignment: v2 mimarisi mühendis kararlarını DECISION node olarak saklar. Motivasyonu bilinmese de (PARSE_UNCERTAIN) kararın kendisi belgelenmiş ve geçerli.

current_patterns: PAT-B-001: AXI Slave Tie-off (very_high educational value)

adequacy_assessment.AXI_protocol_teaching: ADEQUATE — PAT-B-001 (tie-off) + PAT-B-003 (automation) cover AXI protocol understanding
adequacy_assessment.MicroBlaze_ecosystem: ADEQUATE — PAT-B-004 (block automation) covers MicroBlaze setup pattern

missing_patterns.name: AXI Address Map Explicit Assignment
missing_patterns.description: assign_bd_address pattern for explicit AXI address assignment in TCL. Critical for multi-peripheral systems.
missing_patterns.why_missing: Not explicitly captured but present in add_axi_gpio.tcl

missing_patterns.name: Out-of-Context Synthesis
missing_patterns.description: run_synthesis.tcl demonstrates OOC synthesis for faster iteration. Educational for understanding synthesis modes.
missing_patterns.why_missing: Not captured in current ISTER doc patterns

special_analyses.verdict: Mevcut 5 pattern yeterli eğitim değeri sağlıyor. 2 ek pattern (PAT-B-006, PAT-B-007) önerisi ISTER dokümanında ekleme olarak listelenmiş.

special_analyses.topic: Signal Path Ekseninin Her İki Projede Tam Kapsanması
special_analyses.finding: KISMİ KAPSAMA — Her iki projede Signal Path eklendi (v2.0), ancak bazı noktalar eksik

coverage_items.gap: No timing report available — implementation not run, only synthesis

project_a_signal_path.overall: SUBSTANTIALLY_COVERED — all major signal paths documented. Timing evidence missing.

coverage_items.item: Clock distribution (100 MHz PLL → BUFG → fabric)
Reset chain (PLL locked → proc_sys_reset → aresetn + mb_reset)

coverage_items.note: No INTC in PROJECT-B — intentional (educational scope). Not a gap.

coverage_items.item: GPIO output signal path (GPIO register → LED pin)

project_b_signal_path.overall: WELL_COVERED — single clock domain simplifies Signal Path. WNS verified via synthesis.

updates.description: CONFLICT-A-001 doğrulama notu eklendi: project_info.tcl ve design_1.tcl'in xc7a50ticsg324-1L kullandığı ve bunun bir kritik tutarsızlık olduğu kesin olarak doğrulandı.
updates.change: PROJECT-A PROJECT node'unda fpga_part_actual_tcl: xc7a50ticsg324-1L ve fpga_part_intended: xc7a100tcsg324-1 ayrımı netleştirildi. ISSUE-A-001 severity=critical olarak korundu.

updates.description: PARSE_UNCERTAIN etiketinin kapsamı netleştirildi: 'çalışmıyor' gerçeği HIGH confidence ile doğrulanmış (README+code). PARSE_UNCERTAIN yalnızca 'WHY disabled' sorusuna uygulanır (mühendis belgesi yok).
updates.change: DMA-REQ-L2-003 node'unda parse_flag açıklaması PARSE_UNCERTAIN_WHY_DISABLED olarak güncellendi. 'Çalışmıyor' durumu ISSUE-A-002 (HIGH confidence) olarak ayrı tutuldu.
updates.v2_principle: PARSE_UNCERTAIN = engineer not documented rationale. Not = unknown facts.

updates.description: Interrupt altyapısının yazılımda kullanılmaması: DECISION (DMA-DEC-005) olarak doğrulandı, Coverage Gap değil. Bu değerlendirme mevcut ISTER dokümanıyla uyumlu.
updates.change: DMA-DEC-005 classification alanına DECISION rationale eklendi: 'Hardware requirement DMA-REQ-L2-011 SATISFIED. SW polling is architectural choice, not gap.'
updates.v2_principle: Coverage Gap = no component. Decision = component present, usage choice documented.

updates.description: 2 yeni PATTERN node önerisi eklendi: PAT-B-006 (AXI Address Map Explicit Assignment) ve PAT-B-007 (Out-of-Context Synthesis). ISTER dokümanı Pattern bölümüne eklenmelidir.
updates.change: 5.4.5 PATTERN Node'ları bölümüne PAT-B-006 ve PAT-B-007 eklendi.
updates.v2_principle: Pattern extraction from code/scripts is Phase 2 automation task

updates.section: Signal Path ekseni analizi (her iki proje)
updates.description: Her iki projedeki Signal Path ekseni kapsamı analiz edildi. PROJECT-A: timing raporu yok (implementation çalıştırılmamış). PROJECT-B: WNS > 0 ns synthesis ile doğrulandı.
updates.change: DMA-REQ-L1-006 ve AXI-REQ-L1-005 node'larına 'Signal Path Coverage Analysis' referansı eklendi. PROJECT-A timing verification gap'i ISSUE-A-007 ile ilişkilendirildi (testbench yok — timing doğrulaması da yok).
updates.v2_principle: Evidence binding — timing claims must be backed by actual tool reports

updates.description: SDOC-A-001..009 ve SDOC-B-001..011 dosya yolları mevcut sisteme göre normalize edildi. ISTER dokümanındaki Windows pathler (/home/testpc/...) Linux pathlerle (/home/test123/... ve Desktop/fpga_asist_dev-master/...) eşleştirildi.
updates.v2_principle: Provenance accuracy — paths must be resolvable
